transcript:
Speaker A: ನಿನ್ನೆ ಏನು ಮಾಡಿದೆ? [What did you do yesterday?] 
Speaker B: Yesterday I am going to office. 
Speaker A: "I am going" ಅಲ್ಲ, ಅದು present. ಹೀಗೆ ಹೇಳು - I went to office yesterday. ["I am going" is not correct, that is present. Say it like this - I went to office yesterday.] 
Speaker B: ಅಯ್ಯೋ ನಾನು tenses ಅಲ್ಲೇ ಯಾವಾಗಲೂ confuse ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ. [Oh, I always get confused with tenses.] 
Speaker A: ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ, AI Teacher ಜೊತೆ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [No problem, have you practiced with the AI Teacher?] 
Speaker B: ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That must be very costly, right?] 
Speaker A: ಇಲ್ಲ, MySivi app normal classes ಗಿಂತ 7 ಪಟ್ಟು ಚೀಪ್. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನರು MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ English practice ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No, MySivi app is 7 times cheaper than normal classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] 
Speaker B: ಆದ್ರೆ ನನಗೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get time.] 
Speaker A: ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ practice ಸಾಕು. ತುಂಬಾ confident ಆಗ್ತೀರಾ. [Just 15 minutes of practice a day is enough. You will become very confident.] 
Speaker B: Wow super! ಹೇಗೆ join ಮಾಡೋದು? [Wow super! How to join?] 
Speaker A: ಕೆಳಗಿನ install ಬಟನ್ ಒತ್ತಿ MySivi app install ಮಾಡಿ, sign up ಮಾಡಿ practice start ಮಾಡಿ. ಕೇವಲ 15 ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮಗೆ improvement ಕಾಣಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತದೆ. ಬನ್ನಿ, ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ! [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing. You will see improvement in just 15 days. Come, start now!] 
Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text:
ನಿನ್ನೆ ಏನು ಮಾಡಿದೆ? [What did you do yesterday?]
YESTERDAY I AM GOING TO OFFICE.
"I AM GOING" ಅಲ್ಲ... ಅದು PRESENT. ಹೀಗೆ ಹೇಳು - I WENT TO OFFICE YESTERDAY. ["I am going" is not correct... that is PRESENT. Say it like this - I WENT TO OFFICE YESTERDAY.]
ಅಯ್ಯೋ ನಾನು TENSES ಅಲ್ಲೇ ಯಾವಾಗಲೂ CONFUSE ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ. [Oh, I always get confused with TENSES.]
ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ, AI TEACHER ಜೊತೆ PRACTICE ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [No problem, have you PRACTICED with the AI TEACHER?]
ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ COSTLY ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That must be very COSTLY, right?]
ಇಲ್ಲ, MySivi APP NORMAL CLASSES ಗಿಂತ 7X Cheaper. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ ENGLISH PRACTICE ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No, MySivi APP is 7X Cheaper than NORMAL CLASSES. That's why 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE are PRACTICING ENGLISH on MySivi.]
ಆದ್ರೆ ನನಗೆ TIME ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get TIME.]
ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 15 MIN PRACTICE ಸಾಕು. ತುಂಬಾ CONFIDENT ಆಗ್ತೀರಾ. [Just 15 MIN PRACTICE a day is enough. You will become very CONFIDENT.]
WOW SUPER! ಹೇಗೆ JOIN ಮಾಡೋದು? [WOW SUPER! How to JOIN?]
INSTALL ಬಟನ್ ಒತ್ತಿ MySivi APP INSTALL ಮಾಡಿ SIGN UP ಮಾಡಿ PRACTICE START ಮಾಡಿ. [Press the INSTALL button, INSTALL MySivi APP, SIGN UP, and START PRACTICE.]
ಕೇವಲ 15 DAYS ಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮಗೆ IMPROVEMENT ಕಾಣಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತದೆ. ಬನ್ನಿ, ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ! [You will see IMPROVEMENT in just 15 DAYS. Come, start now!]
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
ನಮ್ಮ ಕನ್ನಡ ನಮ್ಮ ಹೆಮ್ಮೆ [Our Kannada, Our Pride]
summary: A split-screen Kannada advertisement where an AI robot avatar corrects a woman's English grammar tense mistake. The AI introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, 7x cheaper alternative to normal classes that requires only 15 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app to see improvement in 15 days.
